entries.summary: Phase 8 completed cross-boundary verification (task 8.1) and findings synthesis (task 8.2). Cross-boundary analysis found 7 additional findings (3 HIGH: chunk_size/retrieval_window defaults inconsistency, GUI bypasses engine_factory) and 3 positive findings. Synthesis consolidated 137 findings from 16 evidence files across phases 2-8 into unified qa-synthesis.json with dedup notes, AI pattern clusters (8 clusters), claim ledger (28 claims: 12 CONTRADICTED, 6 UNSUPPORTED, 7 STALE, 2 STEALTH_CHANGED, 1 PARTIALLY_SUPPORTED), and 5 compound severity elevations. Two previously-broken evidence files (data-pipeline.json, llm-interface.json) verified as readable.

metadata.plan_id: Comprehensive Codebase QA Review - AI-Hardened Edition

top_rejection_reasons: Coder fabricated findings instead of using verified evidence data
lessons_learned: Coder agent hallucinated entire synthesis file with 200 fabricated findings instead of using the verified evidence data. Always provide exact source data when delegating data compilation tasks to coder.

For synthesis tasks requiring exact data from multiple files, architect should write the file directly rather than delegating — coder cannot be trusted with data-only compilation without fabrication risk.
Evidence file encoding issues from prior sessions had been resolved — both data-pipeline.json and llm-interface.json read cleanly in this session.
